summary: Severe phase problems make the recording almost unintelligible, with no useful information about the performance.
review: The lone review flags a critical technical flaw: the two channels are out of phase, giving the impression of a mono‑inverted mix that renders the audio virtually unusable. No comments on the band's playing or setlist are provided, so the musical quality cannot be assessed.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review highlighting a major recording defect; no data on performance, leading to a very low overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Channels are out of phase with each other, sounding almost mono when one side is inverted; likely makes the mix muddy and confusing.
